recommendations.title: 4 Months, 3 Weeks and 2 Days
recommendations.overview: Two college roommates have 24 hours to make the ultimate choice as they finalize arrangements for a black market abortion.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Hills
recommendations.overview: Alina returns to Romania from Germany, hoping to bring Voichita—the only person in the world she loves and was loved by—back with her. But Voichita has found God, and God is the hardest lover of all to best.

recommendations.title: R.M.N.
recommendations.overview: A few days before Christmas, having quit his job in Germany, Matthias returns to his Transylvanian village. He wishes to involve himself more in the education of his son, Rudi, left for too long in the care of his mother, Ana, and to rid him of the u

recommendations.title: The Last King of Scotland
recommendations.overview: Young Scottish doctor, Nicholas Garrigan decides it's time for an adventure after he finishes his formal education, so he decides to try his luck in Uganda, and arrives during the downfall of President Obote. General Idi Amin comes to power and asks

recommendations.title: Mom
recommendations.overview: After her stepdaughter is sexually assaulted at a party, a furious mother sets out to destroy the lives of the four perpetrators who walked free.

recommendations.title: Asterix: The Secret of the Magic Potion
recommendations.overview: Following a fall during mistletoe picking, Druid Getafix decides that it is time to secure the future of the village. Accompanied by Asterix and Obelix, he undertakes to travel the Gallic world in search of a talented young druid to transmit the Secr

recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.

recommendations.title: Freeheld
recommendations.overview: New Jersey car mechanic Stacie Andree and her police detective girlfriend Laurel Hester both battle to secure Hester's pension benefits after she was diagnosed with a terminal illness.

recommendations.title: Landmine Goes Click
recommendations.overview: After an American tourist steps on a landmine, he is forced to watch his girlfriend get assaulted.

recommendations.title: In the Heart of the Sea
recommendations.overview: In the winter of 1820, the New England whaling ship Essex is assaulted by something no one could believe—a whale of mammoth size and will, and an almost human sense of vengeance.
